name: Hoppy Stacky
description: Hoppy Stacky is a fun and addictive arcade game that challenges your timing, precision, and focus. With simple one-tap controls, it’s easy to play but hard to master. Your goal is to stack moving blocks perfectly on top of each other. Each accurate placement increases your score, but even a slight mistake can shrink your stack and bring you closer to game over.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
